hooks.command: if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" inject; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" agent-spawning; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" agent-completed; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" turn-completed; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')); process.exit(c.map?.enabled && c.sessionlog?.sync && c.sessionlog.sync!=='off' ? 0 : 1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" sessionlog-sync; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" subagent-start; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" subagent-stop; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" teammate-idle; fi

if [ -f .claude-swarm.json ] && node -e "process.exit(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-swarm.json','utf-8')).map?.enabled?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; then PLUGIN_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "$(readlink -f "$0" 2>/dev/null || echo "$0")")/.." 2>/dev/null && pwd); node "$PLUGIN_DIR/scripts/map-hook.mjs" task-completed; fi
